1.Title: Terminating Verdict
1.Description: When an <color=#98EFF0>Ice attribute</color> equipper uses a <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, their <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> is increased by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times, once per use of a skill. Repeated triggers refresh the duration. At 2 stacks, the equipper's <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> DMG dealt is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>35%</color>.
